articles.title: Your Family Tree Is Actually a Tangled Web: DNA Rewrites Human Origins
articles.summary: A new DNA study shows early humans didn't come from one group but from many connected populations across Africa. The Nama people's genes reveal a network-like origin that changes how we see evolution.

articles.title: Inside a T. Rex Bone: Blood Vessels That Survived 66 Million Years
articles.summary: Using synchrotron imaging, scientists found preserved blood vessels inside Scotty the T. rex's broken rib. The vessels reveal how the dinosaur healed from a serious injury—and could change how we study fossils.

articles.title: A Cosmic First? Astronomers Spot a Possible 'Superkilonova'
articles.summary: A mysterious explosion called AT2025ulz may be a kilonova hidden inside a supernova—a 'superkilonova.' If confirmed, it would be the first observation of this long-predicted event and could reveal how tiny neutron stars form.
